Protocol# BEExtendedTextInputTraits

iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+tvOS 17.4+visionOS 1.1+

```
protocol BEExtendedTextInputTraits : UITextInputTraits
```

## [Topics](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits#topics)

### [Instance Properties](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits#Instance-Properties)

[`var insertionPointColor: UIColor?`](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits/insertionpointcolor)Customizes the color of the text cursor at the insertion point[`var isSingleLineDocument: Bool`](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits/issinglelinedocument)Represents whether the active web input field is a single line document[`var isTypingAdaptationEnabled: Bool`](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits/istypingadaptationenabled)Disables the learning of new words and corrections and prevents their addition into the keyboard lexicon[`var selectionHandleColor: UIColor?`](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits/selectionhandlecolor)Customizes the color of the selection handles[`var selectionHighlightColor: UIColor?`](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits/selectionhighlightcolor)Customizes the color of the selection highlight rect## [Relationships](/documentation/browserenginekit/beextendedtextinputtraits#relationships)
